name: Coca-Cola Europacific Partners
analysis: CCEP's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $97.7700, stop $91.7037, target $109.7279 (1.97:1) — then trail it.
